basic_details.job_title: IIM Shillong Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Manager, Senior Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Shillong (IIM Shillong)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Shillong (IIM Shillong) Manager, Senior Manager and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 17 June 2026 on the official website iimshillong.ac.in. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Shillong Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: As per rules with relaxation for SC/ST/PwD/NC-OBC
age_limit.details: All Posts: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned in the provided data. Age Relaxation: Upto 5 years for SC/ST/PwD and upto 3 years for NC-OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D., Master's Degree, Associate Member of ICAI or ICWAI, BE/B.Tech/MCA
qualification.details: Deputy General Manager (Knowledge Services): Ph.D. with first class in Master's Degree in Library and Information Science from a recognized University. Deputy General Manager (Alumni Relations): Master's Degree with at least 60% marks preferably in Business Administration/Communications/Public Relations or related areas. Senior Manager (Audit): Associate Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India or Institute of Cost & Works Accountants of India. Manager (Academics): Master's Degree with 60% marks. Preference will be given to candidates with an MBA. Manager (Accreditation): Master's Degree with 60% marks from a recognized University or Equivalent; MBA (General Management or HR) will be preferred. PhD degree in Business Management domain is desirable. Assistant Manager (IT Infrastructure): BE/B.Tech/MCA with 55% marks from a recognized University or Equivalent. Assistant Manager (Mechanical infrastructure): BE/B.Tech (Mechanical Engineering) from a recognized University with 55% Marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 6 to Level 12 of Pay Matrix
salary_details.deputy general manager (knowledge servic: Level 12 of Academic Pay Matrix, initial Basic Pay Rs. 101500/-

selection_process: Interview Written Test Computer Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Shillong to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Shillong Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIM Shillong Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIM Shillong Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Shillong Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Deputy General Manager (Knowledge Services): Ph.D. with first class in Master's Degree in Library and Information Science from a recognized University. Deputy General Manager (Alumni Relations): Master's Degree with at least 60% marks preferably in Business Administration/Communications/Public Relations or related areas. Senior Manager (Audit): Associate Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India or Institute of Cost & Works Accountants of India. Manager (Academics): Master's Degree with 60% marks. Preference will be given to candidates with an MBA. Manager (Accreditation): Master's Degree with 60% marks from a recognized University or Equivalent; MBA (General Management or HR) will be preferred. PhD degree in Business Management domain is desirable. Assistant Manager (IT Infrastructure): BE/B.Tech/MCA with 55% marks from a recognized University or Equivalent. Assistant Manager (Mechanical infrastructure): BE/B.Tech (Mechanical Engineering) from a recognized University with 55% Marks.

content_sections.heading: IIM Shillong Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: No specific minimum or maximum age limit is mentioned in the provided data. Age Relaxation: Upto 5 years for SC/ST/PwD and upto 3 years for NC-OBC candidates.

rows.salary: Level 12 of Academic Pay Matrix, initial Basic Pay Rs. 101500/-

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Documents by Post

content_sections.heading: IIM Shillong Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Interview Written Test Computer Test Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Shillong to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Shillong Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIM Shillong Recruitment 2026 is 20th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy General Manager (Knowledge Services) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Deputy General Manager (Knowledge Services) post. However, the total number of vacancies across all advertised posts is seven.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Manager (IT Infrastructure) position?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Manager (IT Infrastructure) position, candidates must possess a BE/B.Tech/MCA degree with at least 55% marks from a recognized University or equivalent.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, SC/ST candidates are required to pay an application fee of Rs. 200/- (including GST). For General/OBC candidates, the fee is Rs. 400/- (including GST).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the Deputy General Manager (Knowledge Services) post?
faq.answer: The Deputy General Manager (Knowledge Services) post falls under Level 12 of the Academic Pay Matrix, with an initial basic pay of Rs. 101500/-.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided. Upto 5 years for SC/ST/PwD candidates and upto 3 years for NC-OBC candidates are eligible for age relaxation.

faq.question: Q7. What are the modes of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIM Shillong Recruitment 2026 must be submitted online. Candidates need to fill out the application form on the official website or through the provided link.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an Interview, Written Test, Computer Test, and Document Verification. The exact stages may vary depending on the post.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct download link for the official notification PDF is available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read the PDF thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of IIM Shillong?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Shillong is located in Shillong, Meghalaya, with the pincode 793018.
